SREBotIntelligent Observability Platform

Alert investigation directly in your Telegram chat and automated Root Cause Analysis.

Get Started
View on GitHub

AI Incident Analysis

The bot automatically reads Alertmanager chat messages and crafts a detailed RCA reply.

Seamless Navigation

Add SREBot to your incident channels to instantly aggregate alerts and reduce noise through deduplication.

Web Dashboard

Check complete incident histories, manage your subscription billing securely, and review AI deduction flows on the UI portal.
